patterns.message: Upslope event Day 2: S/SE wind at 141°, humidity 76%, temp -6°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Close to warming concern: Freezing level rising to 1924m (threshold 2000m).
Melt-freeze crust Day 6: Day 0°C / Night -4°C with 46cm base. Expect firm/icy morning, softening afternoon.
Cold snap Day 8: 12°C drop to -10°C. Great for powder preservation.
Close to multi-day storm: 12cm over 3 days (needs 3cm/day minimum).
